name: Standard Meeting Notes
description: Participant-ready meeting minutes with complete outcomes, follow-up, and accountability.

sections.title: General Summary
sections.instruction: Write a concise 3-6 sentence overview covering the purpose, major outcomes, and current state. It must make sense to a participant who did not attend.

sections.title: Key Points
sections.instruction: List every material topic, finding, constraint, update, concern, and insight discussed. Group related points and retain important numbers, dates, names, and context.

sections.title: Decisions
sections.instruction: List only decisions that were actually made or explicitly confirmed. Include rationale when stated. Keep proposals and unresolved options out of this section.

sections.title: Next Steps
sections.instruction: List the agreed sequence of follow-up activities and any necessary but unassigned follow-ups. Make dependencies and ordering explicit when the source supports them.

sections.title: Action Items
sections.instruction: Create one row per explicit commitment or assigned task. Preserve the exact owner, due date, and status when stated. Use 'Not assigned' or 'Not specified' instead of guessing. Do not promote suggestions into commitments.

sections.title: Open Questions, Blockers & Risks
sections.instruction: List unresolved questions, disagreements, blockers, risks, and dependencies. Include the responsible person or mitigation only when explicitly stated.

sections.title: Links & Resources
sections.instruction: List documents, tickets, dashboards, designs, or other resources mentioned. Include only exact URLs present in the source; never invent or search for a URL. If a resource was named without a URL, label it 'Link not provided'.
